mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 260 in the CPIAUCSL series triggers central bank rate hikes, which increase equity discount rates and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 260.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong economic demand, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show no significant correlation with combined GDPC1 and INDPRO growth (Pearson r < 0.15).

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market, indicated by PAYEMS growth above 140k and UNRATE decline below 8.0%, increases consumer spending and corporate margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns in triggered periods show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production (INDPRO) combined with falling housing starts (HOUST) signals weak supply-side dynamics, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with combined INDPRO and HOUST declines (Pearson r > -0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising residential sales (RSAFS) above 530k signals strong housing demand, boosting construction activity and corporate earnings, which generate positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns in RSAFS expansion periods show no significant outperformance (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising CPIAUCSL and falling FEDFUNDS indicates accommodative monetary policy amid inflation, which drives equity risk premiums and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no significant correlation with combined CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS movements (Pearson r > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE) below 7.5% combined with rising payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 140k signals a strong labor market, driving consumer confidence and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns in triggered periods show no significant outperformance relative to baseline (t-test p > 0.10).
